description:
Returns aircraft within the boundaries of the given geographical region.

Supported regions:
* Northern/Eastern/Southern/Western Europe
* North/Central/South America
* Central/East/South-East/South/West Asia
* North/Middle/East/South/West Africa
* Australia and New Zealand
* Caribbean
* Melanesia
* Micronesia
* Polynesia


To filter by 'North America' use pure text value from the list above. Remove spaces, or URL-encode them. Case-insensitive.
            
* `/api/aircraft/v2/geospatial/region/NorthAmerica`
* `/api/aircraft/v2/geospatial/region/North%20America`


To filter by 'South-East Asia':
            
* `/api/aircraft/v2/geospatial/region/south-eastasia`
* `/api/aircraft/v2/geospatial/region/South-East%20Asia`

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Name of the geographical region from the list above. Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: Accept-Encoding
parameters.description: The encoding type the client will accept in the response. API call must use compression.

200.description: Response containing a collection of aircraft models.
